features.name: Package.swift with 3 targets (MemoryCore lib, MemoryToolApp, MemoryMCP CLI)
Basic project structure (Sources/, Tests/ directories)
features.notes: Placeholder files so all targets compile

features.name: .gitignore for Swift/Xcode/SPM
swift build succeeds with zero warnings
SQLite database setup with GRDB (WAL mode, migrations)
features.notes: WAL mode, 3 migrations (core tables, FTS5, trigram)

features.name: Memory model — struct + GRDB Record conformance
Tag model + memory_tag join table
FTS5 virtual table for full-text search
features.notes: Trigram tokenizer for CJK substring search

features.name: MemoryService — CRUD + search + filter API
features.notes: FTS5+LIKE search, tag management, category/stats APIs

features.name: Unit tests for MemoryCore (80%+ coverage)
features.notes: 62 tests covering CRUD, search, tags, CJK, pagination, edge cases

features.name: MCP stdio transport setup with swift-sdk
features.notes: DB path via env var or default, no print() used

features.name: remember tool — store new memory via MCP
recall tool — FTS5 keyword search via MCP
forget tool — delete memory by ID
update_memory tool — modify existing memory
list_categories + get_memory tools
MCP server tested end-to-end with Claude Code
features.notes: ToolHandler dispatches all 6 tools correctly, verified with swift test

features.name: App entry point + main window with NavigationSplitView
features.notes: Three-column: sidebar, list, detail; auto-refresh lifecycle

features.name: Memory list view with search bar
features.notes: Real-time search, context menu, swipe-to-delete, empty state

features.name: Memory detail/edit view
features.notes: TextEditor, category picker, tag UI, source, metadata fields

features.name: Create new memory sheet
features.notes: Content editor, category picker with custom option, tag suggestions

features.name: Delete with confirmation + bulk operations
Tag management sidebar
features.notes: All Memories badge, category counts, tag list with icons

features.name: Settings view (DB path display, export/import JSON)
features.notes: In File menu, JSON + Markdown export

features.name: Companion binary packaging in app bundle
One-click MCP config installer (writes claude settings)
Data export/import (JSON format)
features.notes: JSON with version/exported_at metadata, Markdown export also available

features.name: Error handling and user-facing alerts
End-to-end test: GUI create → MCP recall → GUI verify
